description: The Box Gradient Value Spatial Variable`1 component is a Spatial variables variable where the value changes from Start to End value along a Direction. This works best when the direction is aligned with one of the cube's axes. Start value starts at the edge of the shape and goes inwards towards the center.

fields.Size: The size of the cube in which this variable can be sampled from.
fields.GradientDirection: The direction the Gradient goes in local space to the Spatial variable.

usage: Attach to a slot and provide a size and variable name in order for this to function.
